---
toc: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: arluxis-styles.css
---

```{=html}
<!-- Fonts -->
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,300;1,400;1,500;1,600;1,700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

<!-- favicon -->
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/assets/favicon-96x96.png" sizes="96x96" />
<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/assets/favicon.svg" />
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="/assets/favicon.ico" />
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="/assets/apple-touch-icon.png" />
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="ARLUXIS" />
<link rel="manifest" href="/assets/site.webmanifest" />

<!-- Navigation Bar -->
<nav class="navbar">
  <div class="nav-container">
    <a href="index.html" class="back-link">← Back to Home</a>
    <h1 class="portfolio-title">ARLUXIS</h1>
    <a href="https://www.instagram.com/arluxis/" target="_blank" class="instagram-link">
      <img src="icons\instagram_white.png" alt="Instagram" class="social-icon">
        Instagram
    </a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- Hero Section -->
<section class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h2 class="hero-subtitle">Photography Portfolio</h2>
    <p class="hero-description">Exploring light, moments, and perspectives through the lens.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Gallery Section -->
<section class="gallery-section">
  
  <!-- Portraits -->
  <h3 class="gallery-category-title">Portraits</h3>
  <div class="gallery-container">
    
    <div class="photo-item">
      <img src="images/arthur.jpg" alt="Portrait" class="photo-img">
      <div class="photo-overlay">
        <p class="photo-caption">Portrait</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Add more portrait photos here -->

  </div>

  <!-- Nature -->
  <h3 class="gallery-category-title">Nature</h3>
  <div class="gallery-container">
    


    <!-- Add more nature photos here -->

  </div>

  <!-- Movement -->
  <h3 class="gallery-category-title">Movement</h3>
  <div class="gallery-container">
    
    <div class="photo-item">
      <img src="images/sunday_running_club.jpg" alt="Running" class="photo-img">
      <div class="photo-overlay">
        <p class="photo-caption">Running</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Add more movement photos here -->

  </div>

  <!-- Template for adding new categories:
  <h3 class="gallery-category-title">Category Name</h3>
  <div class="gallery-container">
    
    <div class="photo-item">
      <img src="images/your-photo.jpg" alt="Description" class="photo-img">
      <div class="photo-overlay">
        <p class="photo-caption">Your Caption</p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
  -->

</section>

<!-- About Section -->
<section class="about-portfolio-section">
  <div class="about-portfolio-content">
    <h3>About ARLUXIS</h3>
    <p>Recently embarked on a photography journey, capturing moments that blend science, nature, and everyday beauty. Follow along on <a href="https://www.instagram.com/arluxis/" target="_blank" class="inline-link">Instagram</a> for more.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Footer -->
<footer class="portfolio-footer">
  <p>© 2025 Arthur Declercq | <a href="index.html" class="footer-link">Back to Main Site</a></p>
</footer>

<!-- Lightbox for full-size images -->
<div id="lightbox" class="lightbox">
  <span class="lightbox-close">&times;</span>
  <img class="lightbox-content" id="lightbox-img">
  <div class="lightbox-caption" id="lightbox-caption"></div>
</div>

<!-- JavaScript for lightbox functionality -->
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const lightbox = document.getElementById('lightbox');
    const lightboxImg = document.getElementById('lightbox-img');
    const lightboxCaption = document.getElementById('lightbox-caption');
    const closeBtn = document.querySelector('.lightbox-close');
    const photoItems = document.querySelectorAll('.photo-item');

    // Open lightbox when clicking on a photo
    photoItems.forEach(item => {
      item.addEventListener('click', function() {
        const img = this.querySelector('.photo-img');
        const caption = this.querySelector('.photo-caption');
        
        lightbox.style.display = 'flex';
        lightboxImg.src = img.src;
        lightboxImg.alt = img.alt;
        lightboxCaption.textContent = caption ? caption.textContent : '';
        
        // Prevent body scroll when lightbox is open
        document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      });
    });

    // Close lightbox when clicking the X button
    closeBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
      lightbox.style.display = 'none';
      document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
    });

    // Close lightbox when clicking outside the image
    lightbox.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      if (e.target === lightbox) {
        lightbox.style.display = 'none';
        document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
      }
    });

    // Close lightbox with Escape key
    document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
      if (e.key === 'Escape' && lightbox.style.display === 'flex') {
        lightbox.style.display = 'none';
        document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
      }
    });
  });
</script>

```
